overview: North Investors Profit Wallet (NIPW) is a professional cryptocurrency investment dashboard and broker platform with a Coinbase-style dark theme. It features a $6M BTC portfolio display, live crypto price feeds, Send/Receive money flows, a deposit receipt process, broker services, and a Site Admin panel for tracking all user activities in real time.
features: Investor Key gate (NWAU6984C) for verified access
Login and account creation with Username, Gmail, and Password
$6,000,000 BTC balance display with withdrawal policy
Live crypto price feed (BTC, ETH, SOL, BNB) via CoinGecko
Send and Receive money flows with reference numbers
Fund Account with BTC, USDT (TRC-20/ERC-20), and card payment tabs
Deposit receipt upload with reference number and account activation
Site Admin panel with login activity log and all user action tracking
Global activity audit trail (logins, deposits, withdrawals, sends, receives)
Professional invoice-style activity display with filters and print support
Full SEO optimization (Open Graph, JSON-LD, sitemap)
